title: Compliance: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_tx.c link signatures
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.3-8.5. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_tx.c. Status: COMPLIANT (conditional). TX path (lichen_link_tx L31-275): When ctx->has_key is set, signs with schnorr48_sign_frame() at L122-126 before transmission, appends 48-byte signature to payload, sets signature present bit (L185-187). Note: Signing only occurs if ctx->has_key is true; callers must ensure key is loaded.
